Preserved the observed German strings and explicit non-claims, updated localization quality docs, and did not claim TestFlight, full app coverage, full layout correctness, device-verified, or repo-managed screenshot-verified proof because the screenshot binary was not available as a local workspace artifact.

This records only the visible Today dashboard surface from the provided screenshot, not full German app coverage or full layout correctness.
